/usr/bin/llvm-ar-13 qc libwingfuzz_static.a CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerCrossOver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerDataFlowTrace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerExtFunctionsDlsym.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerExtFunctionsWeak.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerExtFunctionsWindows.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerExtraCounters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerExtraCountersDarwin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerExtraCountersWindows.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerFork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerIOPosix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerIOWindows.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerInterceptors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerMerge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerMutate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerSHA1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerTraceMemory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerTracePC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerUtil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerUtilDarwin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerUtilFuchsia.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerUtilLinux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerUtilPosix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wingfuzz_static.dir/FuzzerUtilWindows.cpp.o
/usr/bin/llvm-ranlib-13 libwingfuzz_static.a
